verdict.summary: The added snapshot comment accurately documents the repository structure and existing coverage model. `zk/compose/Nargo.toml` is a workspace-only manifest, the root has no `main.nr`, each proving package is a workspace member, and the existing tests separately require baselines for every compose member and discover bin-type circuits elsewhere under `zk/`. The wording also preserves the required not-yet-sound/external-audit caveat and makes no new implementation or soundness claim. This documentation-only change is correct and complete as scoped.
